text:
You are a teammate on the swarm-wave team. Your task is:

**Task #8: [str-3ky9.11] Recording mode (--record)** (P2, feature)

Add --record CLI flag for intentional recording sessions. Runs against full integration stack, records all external call inputs/outputs, builds ExternalDepBehavior maps, saves to .shatter/recorded-mocks/ as fixtures for future autonomous runs.

**Acceptance criteria:**
- CLI --record flag works
- External call I/O recorded
- Behavior maps saved
- Recorded data usable as seeds in future runs

**Workflow:**
1. Mark task #8 as in_progress with TaskUpdate
2. `bd start str-3ky9.11` to create branch
3. Research existing mock infrastructure: look at ExternalDepBehavior, MockValueSpace, mock generation in shatter-core and shatter-ts
4. Also check how --record relates to str-3ky9.10 (MockValueSpace enum and live-first logic) which is already done
5. Implement the --record flag in shatter-cli
6. Add recording logic to capture external call I/O during execution
7. Serialize recorded mocks to .shatter/recorded-mocks/
8. Add tests
9. Run cargo test and cargo clippy
10. Commit, mark task #8 as completed
11. Send a message to team-lead with results
